title: The Disease and the Sacrifice
description: The story returns from Noland and Calgara’s past to the present fight, where the golden bell must finally answer the old promise.
scene: Across pages 15, 16, 17, this scene focuses on Mont Blanc Noland, Noland, Calgara, Musse, Shandia villagers. The story returns from Noland and Calgara’s past to the present fight, where the golden bell must finally answer the old promise.

dialogue.speaker: Noland
dialogue.text: You're not taking our land from us!

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Noland
dialogue.text: that we would meet again one day.

summary: The story returns from Noland and Calgara’s past to the present fight, where the golden bell must finally answer the old promise.
